languages.text: "...линии, известной как Нищие Принцы. Данный Патриарх — предок местных генокультов. Его присутствие было раскрыто, и я счел необходимым забрать эту уникальную особь до того, как люди нашли способ управиться с живущим под их поселением паразитом".

traits.locale_text: "Патриарх Нищих Принцев — предок местных генокультов. Его присутствие было раскрыто, и я счел необходимым забрать эту уникальную особь до того, как люди нашли способ управиться с живущим под их поселением паразитом".

languages.text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."
languages.original_text: "...линии, известной как Нищие Принцы. Данный Патриарх — предок местных генокультов. Его присутствие было раскрыто, и я счел необходимым забрать эту уникальную особь до того, как люди нашли способ управиться с живущим под их поселением паразитом".

"The Patriarch of the Pauper Princes is the Sire of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

"...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

"...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

languages.text: “……这一支系名为破落诸侯，这位族长是本地基因窃取者教团的创始人。他的存在暴露后，我认为必须在人类找到办法消灭藏在他们定居点下方的寄生虫之前，把这个珍贵个体带走。”
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: “……这一支系名为破落诸侯，这位族长是本地基因窃取者教团的创始人。他的存在暴露后，我认为必须在人类找到办法消灭藏在他们定居点下方的寄生虫之前，把这个珍贵个体带走。”

languages.text: «... cepa conocida como los Príncipes Pobres. Este patriarca es el progenitor de los Cultos Genestealer locales. Su presencia fue descubierta y consideré necesario acoger a esta singular criatura antes de que los humanos encontraran la forma de eliminar al parásito que vivía bajo su asentamiento».
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: «... cepa conocida como los Príncipes Pobres. Este patriarca es el progenitor de los Cultos Genestealer locales. Su presencia fue descubierta y consideré necesario acoger a esta singular criatura antes de que los humanos encontraran la forma de eliminar al parásito que vivía bajo su asentamiento».

languages.text: « ... d'une souche appelée les Princes des Pauvres. Ce patriarche est le fondateur des cultes Genestealer locaux. Les humains ont fini par avoir vent de sa présence, et j'ai préféré extraire cet individu unique avant que l'humanité ne trouve un moyen d'exterminer les parasites en leur sein. »
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: « ... d'une souche appelée les Princes des Pauvres. Ce patriarche est le fondateur des cultes Genestealer locaux. Les humains ont fini par avoir vent de sa présence, et j'ai préféré extraire cet individu unique avant que l'humanité ne trouve un moyen d'exterminer les parasites en leur sein. »

languages.text: "Sefil Prensler olarak bilinen soy. Bu Reis, yerel Gençalan Tarikatlarının Atası'dır. Varlığı açığa çıkınca... İnsanlar yerleşimlerinin altında yaşayan paraziti ortadan kaldırmanın bir yolunu bulmadan önce bu eşsiz bireyi almayı gerekli gördüm."
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: "Sefil Prensler olarak bilinen soy. Bu Reis, yerel Gençalan Tarikatlarının Atası'dır. Varlığı açığa çıkınca... İnsanlar yerleşimlerinin altında yaşayan paraziti ortadan kaldırmanın bir yolunu bulmadan önce bu eşsiz bireyi almayı gerekli gördüm."

languages.text: "... als Arme Prinzen bekannter Strang. Dieser Patriarch ist der Stammvater der örtlichen Symbiontenkulte. Niemand wusste von seiner Gegenwart, also hielt ich es für nötig, dieses einzigartige Individuum an mich zu bringen, ehe die Menschen einen Weg fanden, den Parasiten unter ihrer Siedlung zu beseitigen."
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: "... als Arme Prinzen bekannter Strang. Dieser Patriarch ist der Stammvater der örtlichen Symbiontenkulte. Niemand wusste von seiner Gegenwart, also hielt ich es für nötig, dieses einzigartige Individuum an mich zu bringen, ehe die Menschen einen Weg fanden, den Parasiten unter ihrer Siedlung zu beseitigen."

languages.text: 「…貧しい王子と呼ばれるこの派閥。この父長は、この地のゲノスティーラー教団の祖先です。彼の存在が明らかになり、この独特な個体を人間が住む地の下に寄生する寄生生物を駆除する方法を見つける前に、私は彼を連れて行く必要がありました。」
languages.original_text: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."

traits.locale_text: 「…貧しい王子と呼ばれるこの派閥。この父長は、この地のゲノスティーラー教団の祖先です。彼の存在が明らかになり、この独特な個体を人間が住む地の下に寄生する寄生生物を駆除する方法を見つける前に、私は彼を連れて行く必要がありました。」
